source: SEC EDGAR XBRL frames API via renquant_base_data.sec_fundamentals (weekly refresh cron; FMP income-statement acceptedDate backfills point-in-time availability)
freshness_rule: serving date axis reaches the latest OHLCV price date (resolve_serving_daily_index, decoupled from the alpha158 training-label clip); per-entity quarterly snapshots advance within the ~45d SEC filing lag (fiscal_period_end/available_at provenance columns; consumer gate renquant-pipeline P-FUND-FRESHNESS)
note: Registry entry for the daily serving fundamentals feature feed (earnings_yield, book_to_price, gross_profitability, roe, asset_growth consumed by panel scoring). The authoritative, fingerprinted per-run manifest with per-feature finite-coverage fractions (coverage/n_have/n_expected/min_coverage — field vocabulary aligned with renquant-pipeline DataAvailabilityGate data_contracts.v1 axis contracts, fundamentals_serving_axis) and the coverage_ok verdict is written by renquant_base_data.sec_fundamentals.write_daily_ingestion_manifest to <data_dir>/ingestion_manifest_sec_fundamentals_daily.json (fingerprint impl reused from crypto_bars — single impl). IMPUTED-SHARE guard rationale (orchestrator PR #475, 2026-07-11): every non-finite feature cell is silently cross-sectional-median-imputed by the panel scorer, so finite coverage IS the complement of the imputed share; the build WARNS below floor (degrade_with_alarm) and --verify FAILS, so a coverage regression can never again sit dark for months.
